summary: Strong week for actionable intelligence: Quebec SEAO has AI consulting RFP closing March 3, IVADO launches 2025 industry partnership program. Moov AI's STM win reveals public sector procurement playbook. US quant funds ramping AI hiring - OpenAI stealing talent. Three Montreal professors actively seeking industry collaborators this week.

highlights.title: Quebec SEAO RFP: AI Consulting Services
highlights.summary: SAAQ (Quebec auto insurance) seeking AI consulting for claims processing. $250K-500K range. Deadline March 3. Must be registered in Quebec.
highlights.relevance: Action: Register on SEAO, review RFP, decide bid by Friday
highlights.action: Register on SEAO today, download RFP specs

highlights.title: HEC Warin: Data Science for Global Transformations
highlights.summary: Prof Warin at HEC Montreal focuses on AI regulation, economic analysis, and data science for global business. Potential collaboration on AI adoption frameworks.
highlights.relevance: Business school perspective on AI adoption, executive education partnerships

highlights.title: Moov AI STM Win - Procurement Playbook
highlights.summary: Moov won STM Orange Line ML contract. Key insight: 'mentoring-heavy model' with knowledge transfer requirements. Replicable approach.
highlights.relevance: Action: Study proposal structure, apply to similar RFPs
highlights.action: Request STM RFP docs through contacts

highlights.title: ODSC AI East 2026 - Boston
highlights.summary: May 13-15. Nicholas should attend: quant ML track, Boston Dynamics keynote, hedge fund recruiting fair. Early bird ends March 1.
highlights.relevance: Action: Register before March 1, book travel this week
highlights.action: Compare ODSC vs NeurIPS ROI, decide

highlights.title: OpenAI Raids Wall Street Quants
highlights.summary: OpenAI recruiting from Citadel, Two Sigma with $10M+ packages. Hedge funds desperate, spending on external ML expertise.
highlights.relevance: Action: Pitch EventHorizonIQ to NYC quant funds
highlights.action: Draft NYC hedge fund outreach list

highlights.title: IVADO 2025 Industry Partnership Program
highlights.summary: Open call for industry partners. Access to 300+ researchers, co-funding available. Applications reviewed monthly.
highlights.relevance: Action: Apply as SME partner, get Mila access

tech_research.title: Speech-Text LLM Alignment
tech_research.summary: New architecture from Google reduces transcription errors 40% by jointly training on audio + text representations. Directly applicable to TonalityIQ.
tech_research.relevance: TonalityIQ: Adapt architecture for stress detection
tech_research.action: Read paper, evaluate for TonalityIQ integration

tech_research.title: Time-Series Anomaly Detection at Scale
tech_research.summary: AWS team publishes production system for real-time financial anomaly detection. Handles 1M+ metrics/sec. Open source.
tech_research.action: Clone repo, test on sample data

tech_research.title: Jailbreak Detection via Attention Patterns
tech_research.summary: New technique detects adversarial prompts by analyzing attention head divergence. 89% accuracy, no training required.
tech_research.relevance: Bastion: Add to CTF detection toolkit

tech_research.title: LLM Quantization for Edge Deployment
tech_research.summary: Microsoft Research releases bitnet.cpp — run 3B parameter models on Raspberry Pi. 10x speedup vs naive quantization.
tech_research.action: Test bitnet.cpp for voice model edge deployment
